name: fray-codex
description: Explicit, prompt-first orchestration with model-routed Codex subagents.

interface.longDescription: Adds explicit-only Fray orchestration with native per-dispatch model and effort routing, scoped delegation, worker-owned scratchpads when useful, return reconciliation, and outcome-oriented reporting.
defaultPrompt: Use $fray-codex:fray-orchestrator to run this audit as a campaign.
